name: Pumpkin Waffles from Southern Living
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, allspice, salt, and ginger.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together egg yolks, milk, mashed pumpkin, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.
4. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites into the batter using a spatula.
5. Pour the batter into a preheated, oiled waffle iron.
6. Cook until the waffles are crisp and golden brown.
7. Serve with butter, maple syrup, and toasted pecans.
Source: Southern Living, November, 1995
